screens.name: Repository Cleanup
screens.purpose: Remove non-UI music-analysis code and artifacts without changing active user-facing app layouts.

ux_rules: Do not change visual layout unless a removed data dependency requires it.
Keep the Songs page functional with remaining song data.
Keep the Quiz page and navigation intact.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: No rendered UI layout change is intended beyond removing an audio-derived song entry from existing data.
interaction_risks: Deleting the package without removing aliases could leave typecheck failures.
Removing song seed data could break imports if the list still references it.
required_states: app builds without music-analysis package references
notes: Browser verification is not required unless rendered UI changes are introduced.

constraints: Do not revert unrelated user changes outside the music-analysis removal.
Delete clearly related music-analysis directories and docs.
Keep quiz implementation files untouched except as needed by shared verification.

critical_judgments: No active package/config references point at deleted music-analysis files.
must_not_regress: Quiz route and nav remain present.
Songs page still has valid data.

visual_constraints: No visual redesign is in scope.
